title: bilabrella humilior
intro: Bilabrella humilior, also known as the creeping bilabrella, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which contain flavonoids and triterpenoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Bilabrella humilior include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Bilabrella humilior can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
